name: Wendy's Chili Seasoning
recipeIngredient: 1 Tablespoon Dry Minced Onions, crush very fine
1 Teaspoon Dry Parsley Flakes, rubbed to dust
1 Teaspoon Granulated Garlic, grind to powder
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a bowl.
2. Stir until well mixed.
3. Transfer the mixture to a clean bottle with an airtight lid.
4. Store at room temperature for up to 6 months.
